name: Ixeep, Omen of the Ghoti
name_jp: ゴーティスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>兆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きざし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イグジープ
desc: If a Fish monster(s) is banished (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During the Standby Phase of the next turn after this card was banished: You can target 1 of your "Ghoti" Traps that is banished or in your GY; Set that target. You can only use each effect of "Ixeep, Omen of the Ghoti" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a Fish monster(s) is banished (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During the Standby Phase of the next turn after this card was banished: You can target 1 of your "Ghoti" Traps that is banished or in your GY; Set that target. You can only use each effect of "Ixeep, Omen of the Ghoti" once per turn.
eff: If a Fish monster(s) is banished (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During the Standby Phase of the next turn after this card was banished: You can target 1 of your "Ghoti" Traps that is banished or in your GY; Set that target. You can only use each effect of "Ixeep, Omen of the Ghoti" once per turn.

action: Activates if other cards are banished
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
